infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Travi uses your location to show where you are on the globe when planning a new trip.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Travi needs access to your photos to add cover images and stop photos to your Travis.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Travi uses your camera to take photos for your Travis.

plugins.photosPermission: Travi needs access to your photos to add images to your Travis.
plugins.cameraPermission: Travi uses your camera to capture travel memories.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Travi uses your location to show where you are on the globe.
